rulings.Case Title: GUARDIANSHIP OF KANE JACKSON LEUNG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Compliance With Deposition Subpoena
rulings.Rulings: Petitioner's Motion to Compel Compliance with Deposition Subpoena is DENIED. Under the Trust instrument, the minors are contingent beneficiaries of the Trust (see sections 2.5a, 2.6) ), and under certain circumstances, the principle or Trust estate may be invaded during the Grantor's lifetime (e.g. sections 2.2, 5.13). Thus, the minors' interest in the Trust is too indefinite and speculative to warrant including as an asset on the Guardianship Inventory and Appraisal at this time. The subpoenaed information is not currently relevant to filing an Inventory and Appraisal under Probate Code § 2610. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) and opposing parties no later than 4:00 p.m. Wednesday, April 10,2019.
